SEE ALL SERVICES →

Who We Are

Decades of Flooring Excellence in Miami

Flooring Kingdom started with a simple mission: provide Miami homes and businesses with flooring solutions that last. Founded by local craftsman, Javier Rodriguez, we understood the unique challenges of our climate – the humidity, the sun, the occasional hurricane – and built a company to meet them head-on.

We're not just installers; we're flooring specialists. We meticulously assess every space, consider the wear and tear it will endure, and recommend the best materials and techniques for the job. Our commitment to quality craftsmanship and open communication ensures your complete satisfaction.

Miami is our home, and we take pride in contributing to its vibrant community. We source materials locally whenever possible, partner with local contractors, and actively support neighborhood initiatives. When you choose Flooring Kingdom, you're investing in Miami.

15+ Years
1200+ Projects
98% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Flooring Kingdom

Climate-Resistant Materials

We specialize in flooring designed to withstand Miami's heat, humidity, and potential flooding, ensuring lasting beauty and performance.

Expert Installation

Our skilled team has years of experience installing all types of flooring, from hardwood to tile, with precision and care.

Comprehensive Consultation

We provide personalized consultations to understand your needs, budget, and style, guiding you through the entire process.

Guaranteed Satisfaction

We stand behind our work with a satisfaction guarantee. We're not happy until you are.

Transform Your Space Today

Get a free quote and discover the perfect flooring solution for your Miami home or business.

Get a Free Estimate Call +13055084269

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Flooring Kingdom transformed my kitchen in Coconut Grove! The installers were professional, efficient, and the tile work is impeccable. Javier helped me choose the perfect tile to match my cabinets, and the whole process was stress-free. Highly recommend!

Maria G. Tile Flooring Installation
“

We had Flooring Kingdom install hardwood in our living room in Brickell. The floors are beautiful, and the crew was very professional. There was a minor delay due to a material shortage, but Javier communicated with us every step of the way and made sure we were happy with the final result.

David S. Hardwood Flooring Installation
“

Flooring Kingdom installed laminate flooring in our bedrooms. The price was fair, the installation was quick, and the floors look great! Very happy with the service.

Jessica R. Laminate Flooring Installation
“

We had some water damage in our bathroom, and Flooring Kingdom came to the rescue. They repaired the floor quickly and efficiently, and you can't even tell there was ever any damage. Highly recommend their repair services!

Carlos M. Flooring Repair Services
“

Flooring Kingdom installed new vinyl flooring in our office. The floors look great and are very durable. The installation process was smooth and efficient. Would use again.

Luis V. Vinyl Flooring Installation
“

Javier and his crew at Flooring Kingdom are amazing! They installed beautiful hardwood floors throughout my entire home. They were extremely professional, punctual, and meticulous with their work. They even helped me move some heavy furniture. I highly recommend them!

Sarah K. Hardwood Flooring Installation

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

Is hardwood flooring suitable for Miami's humid climate?
Yes, with proper installation and maintenance. We use moisture-resistant underlayments and recommend engineered hardwood for areas prone to moisture.
How often should I refinish my hardwood floors?
Typically every 7-10 years, depending on foot traffic and wear and tear. We offer professional refinishing services to restore your floors to their original beauty.
What is the best way to clean hardwood floors?
Use a damp mop with a pH-neutral cleaner specifically designed for hardwood floors. Avoid excessive water and harsh chemicals.
